message:
test(core): comprehensive circuit_breaker + error_codes test suites

circuit_breaker: 30 new tests (35 total, was 5). Covers config clamping,
all state machine transitions (closed/open/half-open), status snapshots
for each state, serde roundtrips, CascadeTracker logic (single/multi
subsystem, dedup, no-subsystem), subsystem_for_circuit mapping, and
full lifecycle scenarios.

error_codes: 21 new tests (28 total, was 7). Covers category range
non-overlap, boundary values, serde roundtrips, from_code edge cases,
RecoveryStep constructors, catalog integrity (key-def match, category
consistency, range membership), format_plain output details (causes,
recovery steps, command prefix), and list function correctness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
